mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in PAYEMS signals expanding household income and stronger near-term earnings expectations, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the coefficient on 3-month PAYEMS growth is non-positive in walk-forward tests or if positive PAYEMS-growth months do not produce higher 20-day SPX returns than negative-growth months.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS rises quickly and crosses above its 12-month moving average, discount-rate pressure reduces equity valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises > 0.50pp over 3 months and crosses above its 12-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases or if the triggered-minus-untriggered return spread is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS growth falls below CPIAUCSL inflation, real consumption momentum deteriorates, weakening revenue expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: 3-month RSAFS growth crosses below 3-month CPIAUCSL inflation
failure_condition: Reject if triggered real-consumption-squeeze periods do not have lower 20-day SPX returns than non-triggered periods or if the interaction term has a non-negative estimated effect.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST signals weakening construction activity and future household durable-goods demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average by more than 10%
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST breakdown signals are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases or if the return spread versus non-breakdown periods is non-negative.

mechanism_narrative: A downside crossing in CPIAUCSL inflation reduces expected policy restraint and lowers discount-rate uncertainty, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: 3-month CPIAUCSL inflation crosses below its 12-month inflation rate
failure_condition: Reject if CPI disinflation crossings are not followed by higher 20-day SPX returns than other periods or if the estimated signal coefficient is zero or negative.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in UNRATE indicates rising recession risk and weaker expected earnings, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases do not precede below-average 60-day SPX returns or if positive 60-day returns occur in more than 60% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: Joint acceleration in INDPRO and HOUST signals synchronized production and construction strength, improving operating leverage and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month growth and HOUST 3-month growth both cross above zero
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive-growth state does not outperform states where only one proxy is improving, or if the interaction coefficient is not positive.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1, RSAFS, and PAYEMS all show positive recent growth, broad demand confirmation raises expected earnings breadth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest quarterly growth, RSAFS 3-month growth, and PAYEMS 3-month growth are all positive
failure_condition: Reject if the three-way demand-confirmation state fails to deliver positive average 5-day SPX returns or does not outperform periods with only one or two positive components.
